about.title: How Scores Are Calculated
about.intro: Every combo in our database receives a score from 1 to 10 based on how frequently it is recommended across multiple trusted sources in the Beyblade X community.
about.scoring.title: Scoring Method
about.scoring.p1: Our scoring algorithm analyzes combo recommendations from competitive players, YouTubers, tournament results, and community discussions. Each source has a reliability weight based on its track record:
about.scoring.tournament: Tournament results (actual wins) carry the highest weight
about.scoring.expert: Expert reviewers and tier list curators are weighted highly
about.scoring.youtube: YouTube creators who test combos with data provide strong evidence
about.scoring.community: Community polls and Reddit discussions serve as supporting data
about.scoring.p2: A combo recommended by multiple independent sources scores higher than one mentioned only once. Recent recommendations are weighted more than older ones.
about.factors.title: What Affects the Score
about.factors.mentions: Number of sources recommending the combo
about.factors.weight: Reliability weight of each source (0.5 to 1.0)
about.factors.consensus: Agreement across different types of sources
about.sources.title: Our Sources
about.sources.intro: We collect data from these community sources:
about.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
about.disclaimer.text: Scores reflect community consensus, not absolute performance. The meta evolves constantly as new parts are released and strategies develop. Use scores as a starting point, and experiment to find what works best for your playstyle.
